provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Botswana Teaching Professionals Council Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

provisions.chapter: PART II Establishment of Botswana Teaching Professionals Council
provisions.title: Establishment of Botswana Teaching Professionals Council
provisions.content:
3. Establishment of Botswana Teaching Professionals Council
(1) There is hereby established a Council to be known as the Botswana Teaching Professionals Council.
(2) The Council shall be a body corporate with perpetual succession and a common seal, capable of suing and being sued in its own name and, subject to the provisions of this Act, perform such acts as bodies corporate may, by law perform.

provisions.chapter: PART II Establishment of Botswana Teaching Professionals Council
provisions.title: Seal of Council
provisions.content:
4. Seal of Council
(1) The seal of the Council shall be such a device as may be determined by the Board and shall be kept by the Registrar.
(2) The affixing of the seal shall be authenticated by the Registrar or any other person authorised in that capacity by the Board.

provisions.chapter: PART II Establishment of Botswana Teaching Professionals Council
provisions.title: Functions of Council

provisions.chapter: PART III Constitution and Qualifications of Board
provisions.title: Establishment of Board

definitions.definition: the Board of the Council established under section 6
the Botswana Teaching Professionals Council established under section 3
assigned to it under the Education Act (Cap. 58:01)

a tutor and any person registered in accordance with section 27 of this Act and qualifies to instruct an educational programme or provide professional counselling including professional therapy and educational psychology services, at school
a licence to practice teaching, issued by the Council under section 30.
